name: Rending Needle: Jailer
additional_info: Increases the Metal Rod cap from 5 to 10, and you can no longer use Metal Pull unless the target has at least 5 rods. Metal Pull now stuns targets for 1.08s, and an additional 0.104s for every additional rod after the fifth (to a maximum of 1.6s). A stunned target has 30% damage reduction.
desc: If an enemy has 5 or more rods, your Ironsing Pull will restrain them instead of pulling them.
